Clear! Here's the implementation:

```
Fix: Make auto-sequence preview table match order table functionality exactly:

---

## 1. INITIALIZE START DATE/TIME — ONLY FIRST ORDER GETS AUTO-GENERATED

```javascript
function calculateCompletionDates(lineOrders, line) {
  if (!lineOrders || lineOrders.length === 0) return [];
  
  const result = [];
  let previousCompletionTime = null;
  
  for (let i = 0; i < lineOrders.length; i++) {
    const order = { ...lineOrders[i] };
    
    // Determine start datetime for THIS order
    let orderStartTime = null;
    
    // For FIRST order — auto-generate if missing
    if (i === 0) {
      const hasStartDate = !!order.start_date;
      const hasStartTime = !!order.start_time;
      
      if (hasStartDate && hasStartTime) {
        // Both set — use them
        orderStartTime = combineDateTime(order.start_date, order.start_time);
      } else if (hasStartDate && !hasStartTime) {
        // Date only — use 08:00 AM
        order.start_time = '08:00';
        orderStartTime = combineDateTime(order.start_date, '08:00');
      } else if (!hasStartDate && hasStartTime) {
        // Time only — use today's date
        const todayStr = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
        order.start_date = todayStr;
        orderStartTime = combineDateTime(todayStr, order.start_time);
      } else {
        // Neither — default to today 08:00 AM
        const todayStr = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
        order.start_date = todayStr;
        order.start_time = '08:00';
        orderStartTime = combineDateTime(todayStr, '08:00');
      }
    } else {
      // For SUBSEQUENT orders
      const hasStartDate = !!order.start_date;
      const hasStartTime = !!order.start_time;
      
      if (hasStartDate && hasStartTime) {
        // User manually set both — use them
        orderStartTime = combineDateTime(order.start_date, order.start_time);
      } else if (hasStartDate && !hasStartTime) {
        // Date only — use 08:00 AM
        orderStartTime = combineDateTime(order.start_date, '08:00');
      } else if (!hasStartDate && hasStartTime) {
        // Time only — use previous completion date (just date part)
        const prevDate = previousCompletionTime 
          ? new Date(previousCompletionTime).toISOString().split('T')[0]
          : new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
        orderStartTime = combineDateTime(prevDate, order.start_time);
      } else {
        // Neither set — cascade from previous order's completion
        orderStartTime = previousCompletionTime || combineDateTime(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], '08:00');
      }
      
      // Keep start_date and start_time blank if user hasn't set them (display)
    }
    
    // Calculate production time
    const volume = parseFloat(order.volume_override || order.volume || order.total_volume_mt) || 0;
    const runRate = getLineRunRate(normalizeLine(line));
    const productionTime = runRate > 0 ? volume / runRate : 0;
    order.production_time = productionTime;
    order._productionTimeHrs = productionTime.toFixed(2);
    
    // Get changeover
    const changeover = order.changeover || 0;
    order._changeoverHrs = changeover.toFixed(2);
    
    // Calculate completion time = start + production + changeover
    const totalHours = productionTime + changeover;
    const completionTime = new Date(orderStartTime.getTime() + totalHours * 60 * 60 * 1000);
    
    order._actualStartTime = orderStartTime.toISOString();
    order.estimated_completion_date = completionTime.toISOString();
    order._estimatedCompletionDisplay = formatDateTime(completionTime);
    
    // Save for next order's cascade
    previousCompletionTime = completionTime;
    
    result.push(order);
  }
  
  return result;
}

function combineDateTime(dateStr, timeStr) {
  if (!dateStr) return new Date();
  if (!timeStr) timeStr = '08:00';
  
  const [hours, minutes] = timeStr.split(':').map(Number);
  const date = new Date(dateStr);
  date.setHours(hours || 0, minutes || 0, 0, 0);
  return date;
}

function formatDateTime(date) {
  if (!date) return '—';
  const d = new Date(date);
  const dateStr = d.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: '2-digit', day: '2-digit', year: 'numeric' });
  const timeStr = d.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', hour12: true });
  return `${dateStr} - ${timeStr}`;
}
```

---

## 2. BUILD PREVIEW RESULTS WITH PROPER DATES

```javascript
async function handlePlantLevelAutoSequence() {
  try {
    // ... existing code ...
    
    const { lineOrdersMap, combinedOrders, placementLog } = await runAutoSequenceWithProgress(...);
    
    // Build results with proper completion dates
    const results = {};
    ALL_LINES_ORDERED.forEach(line => {
      const lineOrders = lineOrdersMap[line] || [];
      if (lineOrders.length === 0) {
        results[line] = [];
        return;
      }
      
      // Clear auto-populated start dates/times for NON-first orders
      const cleanedOrders = lineOrders.map((order, i) => {
        if (i === 0) {
          return order;  // Keep first order's start date/time
        } else {
          // Clear auto-populated values for subsequent orders
          return {
            ...order,
            start_date: order._userSetStartDate ? order.start_date : null,
            start_time: order._userSetStartTime ? order.start_time : null,
          };
        }
      });
      
      // Calculate completion dates (cascades through all orders)
      results[line] = calculateCompletionDates(cleanedOrders, line);
    });
    
    setSequencedResults(results);
    // ... rest of code ...
  } catch (error) {
    // ...
  }
}
```

---

## 3. EDITABLE ROW COMPONENT WITH VALIDATION AND CASCADE

```jsx
function PlantAfterRow({ 
  order, 
  lineIndex, 
  lineOrders, 
  line,
  onOrderUpdate 
}) {
  const [editingField, setEditingField] = useState(null);
  const [editValue, setEditValue] = useState('');
  const inputRef = useRef(null);
  
  const isFirstOrder = lineIndex === 0;
  const previousOrder = lineIndex > 0 ? lineOrders[lineIndex - 1] : null;
  
  useEffect(() => {
    function handleClickOutside(e) {
      if (inputRef.current && !inputRef.current.contains(e.target) && 
          !e.target.closest('.edit-cell-actions')) {
        // Don't close if clicking on action buttons
        setEditingField(null);
      }
    }
    if (editingField) {
      document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
      return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
    }
  }, [editingField]);
  
  function startEdit(fieldKey) {
    setEditingField(fieldKey);
    
    if (fieldKey === 'start_date') {
      setEditValue(order.start_date || '');
    } else if (fieldKey === 'start_time') {
      setEditValue(order.start_time || '');
    }
    
    setTimeout(() => inputRef.current?.focus(), 0);
  }
  
  function validateStartDate(dateStr) {
    if (!dateStr) return { valid: true };  // Empty is valid (will cascade)
    
    const selectedDate = new Date(dateStr);
    const today = new Date();
    today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    
    // Rule 1: Can't set past dates
    if (selectedDate < today) {
      return { valid: false, error: 'Cannot set past dates' };
    }
    
    // Rule 2: Can't set beyond avail date
    if (order.target_avail_date && /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}/.test(String(order.target_avail_date))) {
      const availDate = new Date(order.target_avail_date);
      availDate.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
      
      if (selectedDate > availDate) {
        return { 
          valid: false, 
          error: `Cannot set date beyond avail date (${formatDate(order.target_avail_date)})` 
        };
      }
    }
    
    return { valid: true };
  }
  
  function validateStartTime(timeStr, dateStr) {
    if (!timeStr) return { valid: true };
    
    // Check if this start time would cause a delay
    const startDate = dateStr || order.start_date || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
    const startDateTime = combineDateTime(startDate, timeStr);
    
    const productionTime = order.production_time || 0;
    const changeover = order.changeover || 0;
    const completionTime = new Date(startDateTime.getTime() + (productionTime + changeover) * 60 * 60 * 1000);
    
    // Check against avail date
    if (order.target_avail_date && /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}/.test(String(order.target_avail_date))) {
      const availDate = new Date(order.target_avail_date);
      availDate.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
      
      if (completionTime > availDate) {
        return {
          valid: true,  // Allow it, but warn
          warning: `Setting this start time will cause the order to complete after the avail date (${formatDate(order.target_avail_date)}). This will cause a delay.`
        };
      }
    }
    
    return { valid: true };
  }
  
  function saveEdit(fieldKey) {
    if (!editingField) return;
    
    try {
      if (fieldKey === 'start_date') {
        const validation = validateStartDate(editValue);
        if (!validation.valid) {
          toast.error(validation.error);
          return;
        }
        
        onOrderUpdate?.(order.id, { 
          start_date: editValue, 
          _userSetStartDate: true 
        }, line);
        toast.success('Start date updated');
        
      } else if (fieldKey === 'start_time') {
        const validation = validateStartTime(editValue, order.start_date);
        
        if (!validation.valid) {
          toast.error(validation.error);
          return;
        }
        
        if (validation.warning) {
          // Show confirmation dialog
          const confirmed = window.confirm(`Warning: ${validation.warning}\n\nDo you want to continue?`);
          if (!confirmed) return;
        }
        
        onOrderUpdate?.(order.id, { 
          start_time: editValue, 
          _userSetStartTime: true 
        }, line);
        toast.success('Start time updated');
      }
      
      setEditingField(null);
      setEditValue('');
      
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(`Update failed: ${error.message}`);
    }
  }
  
  function clearEdit(fieldKey) {
    if (isFirstOrder) {
      // First order can't be cleared
      toast.info('First order must have a start date/time for completion calculation');
      return;
    }
    
    if (fieldKey === 'start_date') {
      onOrderUpdate?.(order.id, { 
        start_date: null, 
        _userSetStartDate: false 
      }, line);
    } else if (fieldKey === 'start_time') {
      onOrderUpdate?.(order.id, { 
        start_time: null, 
        _userSetStartTime: false 
      }, line);
    }
    
    setEditingField(null);
    setEditValue('');
    toast.success('Cleared — will cascade from previous order');
  }
  
  function cancelEdit() {
    setEditingField(null);
    setEditValue('');
  }
  
  // Display values
  const startDateDisplay = order.start_date 
    ? new Date(order.start_date).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: '2-digit', day: '2-digit', year: 'numeric' })
    : '—';
  
  const startTimeDisplay = order.start_time 
    ? new Date(`2026-01-01T${order.start_time}:00`).toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', hour12: true })
    : '—';
  
  const minDate = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
  const maxDate = order.target_avail_date && /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}/.test(String(order.target_avail_date)) 
    ? String(order.target_avail_date).substring(0, 10) 
    : undefined;
  
  return (
    <tr className={`auto-sequence-row-after ${order._movement === 'new_to_line' ? 'as-movement-new' : ''}`}>
      <td className="as-col-prio">{order.prio}</td>
      <td className="as-col-fpr">{order.fpr}</td>
      <td className="as-col-planned">
        <div>{order.planned_order_fg || '—'}</div>
        <div className="as-sub-text">{order.planned_order_sfg || '—'}</div>
      </td>
      <td className="as-col-material">{order.material_code_fg}</td>
      <td className="as-col-desc">
        <span className="as-desc-main">{order.item_description}</span>
        <div className="as-sub-text">{order.category}</div>
      </td>
      <td className="as-col-form">{order.form}</td>
      <td className="as-col-volume">{(order.volume_override || order.volume || order.total_volume_mt || 0).toFixed(1)} MT</td>
      <td className="as-col-batches">{order.batches || '—'}</td>
      <td className="as-col-production">
        <span className="production-time-value">{order._productionTimeHrs || '0.00'} hrs</span>
        <span className="production-time-co">CO: {order._changeoverHrs || '0.00'}</span>
      </td>
      
      {/* EDITABLE: Start Date */}
      <td className="as-col-start-date">
        {editingField === 'start_date' ? (
          <div className="edit-cell-container">
            <input
              ref={inputRef}
              type="date"
              value={editValue}
              onChange={(e) => setEditValue(e.target.value)}
              className="as-edit-input as-edit-date"
              min={minDate}
              max={maxDate}
            />
            <div className="edit-cell-actions">
              <button 
                className="edit-btn-save" 
                onClick={() => saveEdit('start_date')} 
                title="Save"
              >
                ✓
              </button>
              <button 
                className={`edit-btn-clear ${isFirstOrder ? 'edit-btn-disabled' : ''}`}
                onClick={() => clearEdit('start_date')}
                disabled={isFirstOrder}
                title={isFirstOrder ? 'First order must have a start date' : 'Clear'}
              >
                ✗
              </button>
              <button 
                className="edit-btn-cancel" 
                onClick={cancelEdit} 
                title="Cancel"
              >
                ⟲
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <span
            className="as-editable-field"
            onClick={() => startEdit('start_date')}
            title="Click to edit start date"
          >
            {startDateDisplay}
          </span>
        )}
      </td>
      
      {/* EDITABLE: Start Time */}
      <td className="as-col-start-time">
        {editingField === 'start_time' ? (
          <div className="edit-cell-container">
            <input
              ref={inputRef}
              type="time"
              value={editValue}
              onChange={(e) => setEditValue(e.target.value)}
              className="as-edit-input as-edit-time"
            />
            <div className="edit-cell-actions">
              <button 
                className="edit-btn-save" 
                onClick={() => saveEdit('start_time')} 
                title="Save"
              >
                ✓
              </button>
              <button 
                className={`edit-btn-clear ${isFirstOrder ? 'edit-btn-disabled' : ''}`}
                onClick={() => clearEdit('start_time')}
                disabled={isFirstOrder}
                title={isFirstOrder ? 'First order must have a start time' : 'Clear'}
              >
                ✗
              </button>
              <button 
                className="edit-btn-cancel" 
                onClick={cancelEdit} 
                title="Cancel"
              >
                ⟲
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <span
            className="as-editable-field"
            onClick={() => startEdit('start_time')}
            title="Click to edit start time"
          >
            {startTimeDisplay}
          </span>
        )}
      </td>
      
      <td className="as-col-avail-date">
        {order.target_avail_date && /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}/.test(String(order.target_avail_date)) ? (
          <>
            <span className="avail-date-value">{formatDate(order.target_avail_date)}</span>
            {order.inferred_target_label && (
              <span className="avail-date-label">{order.inferred_target_label}</span>
            )}
          </>
        ) : (
          <span className="avail-date-label">{order.inferred_target_label || '—'}</span>
        )}
      </td>
      
      {/* CALCULATED: Estimated Completion Date */}
      <td className="as-col-completion-date">
        <span className="completion-date-value">
          {order._estimatedCompletionDisplay || '—'}
        </span>
      </td>
      
      <td className="as-col-insight">
        {order._sequenceInsight && (
          <span className="sequence-insight-badge">
            💡 {order._sequenceInsight.substring(0, 50)}...
          </span>
        )}
      </td>
    </tr>
  );
}
```

---

## 4. UPDATE HANDLER — CASCADE COMPLETION DATES

```javascript
function handleLineOrderUpdate(line, orderId, updates) {
  setSequencedResults(prev => {
    const updated = { ...prev };
    const lineOrders = [...(updated[line] || [])];
    
    const orderIndex = lineOrders.findIndex(o => o.id === orderId);
    if (orderIndex === -1) return prev;
    
    // Apply updates to the specific order
    lineOrders[orderIndex] = { ...lineOrders[orderIndex], ...updates };
    
    // Recalculate completion dates — cascades from updated order onwards
    const recalculated = calculateCompletionDates(lineOrders, line);
    
    updated[line] = recalculated;
    return updated;
  });
}
```

---

## 5. STYLING WITH DISABLED BUTTON

```css
.as-editable-field {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  border-radius: 3px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.15s;
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  min-height: 22px;
}

.as-editable-field:hover {
  background: var(--color-hover-bg, #fef3c7);
  border: 1px dashed var(--color-primary, #f59e0b);
}

.edit-cell-container {
  display: flex;
  gap: 4px;
  align-items: center;
}

.as-edit-input {
  padding: 4px 6px;
  border: 2px solid var(--color-primary, #3b82f6);
  border-radius: 3px;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-family: inherit;
  background: var(--color-input-bg, #ffffff);
  color: var(--color-text, #1f2937);
}

.as-edit-date {
  width: 110px;
}

.as-edit-time {
  width: 80px;
}

.as-edit-input:focus {
  outline: none;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2);
}

.edit-cell-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 2px;
}

.edit-btn-save,
.edit-btn-clear,
.edit-btn-cancel {
  width: 22px;
  height: 22px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 3px;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 700;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  transition: all 0.15s;
}

.edit-btn-save {
  background: #dcfce7;
  color: #16a34a;
}

.edit-btn-save:hover {
  background: #bbf7d0;
}

.edit-btn-clear {
  background: #fecaca;
  color: #dc2626;
}

.edit-btn-clear:hover:not(:disabled) {
  background: #fca5a5;
}

.edit-btn-clear:disabled,
.edit-btn-disabled {
  background: #e5e7eb;
  color: #9ca3af;
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.5;
}

.edit-btn-cancel {
  background: #e5e7eb;
  color: #374151;
}

.edit-btn-cancel:hover {
  background: #d1d5db;
}

.as-col-start-date,
.as-col-start-time,
.as-col-completion-date {
  min-width: 110px;
  padding: 6px 8px;
}

.production-time-value {
  display: block;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--color-text);
}

.production-time-co {
  display: block;
  font-size: 10px;
  color: var(--color-text-secondary);
}

.completion-date-value {
  display: block;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--color-text);
}
```

---

## 6. PASS REQUIRED PROPS

```jsx
{sequencedResults[line]?.map((order, index) => (
  <PlantAfterRow
    key={order.id}
    order={order}
    lineIndex={index}
    lineOrders={sequencedResults[line]}
    line={line}
    onOrderUpdate={(orderId, updates) => 
      handleLineOrderUpdate(line, orderId, updates)
    }
  />
))}
```

---

## VERIFICATION

### First order behavior
1. ✅ If no date/time set → auto-generate (today 08:00 AM)
2. ✅ If date only → auto-add time 08:00
3. ✅ If time only → auto-add today's date
4. ✅ If both set → use as-is
5. ✅ Clear buttons DISABLED with tooltip explaining why

### Subsequent orders
6. ✅ Start date/time blank by default
7. ✅ Completion date cascades from previous order's completion
8. ✅ If user sets date/time → use manual values
9. ✅ If user sets only date → use 08:00 time
10. ✅ If user sets only time → use previous completion's date
11. ✅ Clear buttons enabled — resets to blank/cascade

### Validation
12. ✅ Can't set past dates
13. ✅ Can't set beyond avail date
14. ✅ Warning dialog if start time would cause delay
15. ✅ Allow user to proceed after warning

### Cascade
16. ✅ Change start date/time → all following orders recalculate
17. ✅ Clear date/time → cascades from previous order
18. ✅ Production hours + changeover considered in calculation

### Completion date
19. ✅ Auto-calculated: start + production + changeover
20. ✅ Updates immediately when start date/time changes
21. ✅ Format: "MM/DD/YYYY - HH:MM AM/PM"
```
